news.title: India now makes 1 in 4 iPhones as Apple assembles entire iPhone 17 lineup locally
news.india_relevance: This marks a significant milestone in India's journey as a global electronics manufacturing hub and a shift away from China-centric supply chains.
news.why_it_matters: The move validates India's PLI schemes and technical capability, transitioning from legacy model assembly to cutting-edge product manufacturing.

news.title: Govt invokes Essential Commodities Act to ensure LPG supply, orders refineries to divert key streams
news.india_relevance: The government is using emergency powers to prevent a domestic energy crisis triggered by Middle East tensions.
news.why_it_matters: Prioritizing domestic fuel over industrial inputs highlights the government's focus on inflation control and social stability during geopolitical shocks.

news.title: India File: Iran war reverberates from farmlands to diamond vaults
news.india_relevance: The conflict impacts diverse Indian sectors, from basmati rice exports to the Surat diamond industry's supply of rough stones.
news.why_it_matters: It explains the specific transmission channels through which a distant war affects the livelihoods of Indian farmers and artisans.

news.title: Flipkart shifts holding company to India from Singapore ahead of planned IPO
news.india_relevance: One of India's largest startups is 'reverse flipping' its corporate structure to prepare for a domestic public listing.
news.why_it_matters: This move reflects a growing trend of Indian unicorns returning home to tap into local capital markets and simplify regulatory compliance.

news.title: India Shields Homes From Gas Crisis As Industry Bears Hormuz Shock
news.india_relevance: Indian policy is actively diverting natural gas to households (PNG/CNG) at the expense of industrial sectors like ceramics and chemicals.
news.why_it_matters: This prioritization creates a supply-chain bottleneck for manufacturers, potentially leading to higher output prices and industrial slowdowns.

news.title: Supreme Court agrees to hear Centre’s appeal on fake news IT Rules struck down by Bombay High Court
news.india_relevance: The case determines the government's power to regulate digital content and define 'fake news' on social media platforms.
news.why_it_matters: The outcome will define the boundaries of free speech and government oversight in India's digital economy.

news.title: From 'Stranger Things' to UEFA: India's courts arm content owners with ‘dynamic’ protection against online piracy
news.india_relevance: Indian courts are evolving intellectual property law to provide real-time protection for global and local content creators.
news.why_it_matters: Dynamic injunctions represent a major shift in how digital rights are enforced, benefiting India's growing media and entertainment sector.

news.title: Hybrid super-credits could distort India’s CAFE-III emission targets, warns ex-NITI Aayog official
news.india_relevance: The debate over how to categorize hybrid vehicles vs EVs will shape the future of the Indian automotive industry.
news.why_it_matters: Regulatory choices here will determine which technologies win subsidies and how quickly India can de-carbonize its transport sector.

news.title: PM review asks DoT to check if data can be taxed; wants BSNL to trim staff
news.india_relevance: The government is exploring new revenue streams from the digital economy while pushing for efficiency in a major PSU.
news.why_it_matters: A potential data tax would impact every internet user and digital business in India, while BSNL's restructuring affects the telecom competitive landscape.

news.title: I-T Dept detects ₹408 crore sales suppression in restaurant sector; nudges 63,000 eateries to update returns
news.india_relevance: Tax authorities are using data analytics to target systemic under-reporting in the hospitality sector.
news.why_it_matters: This signals a move toward more aggressive, technology-led tax enforcement in the informal and semi-formal services economy.

news.title: While rivals retreat from default guarantees, Moneyview is doubling down
news.india_relevance: A key Indian fintech is taking a contrarian approach to credit risk and First Loss Default Guarantees (FLDG).
news.why_it_matters: This highlights the evolving risk appetite and business models in India's digital lending space following RBI's regulatory tightening.

news.title: Ather eyes big distribution push in FY27 adding 400 stores—in stark contrast with Ola Electric's shrunk footprint
news.india_relevance: Two leaders in India's EV revolution are diverging in their retail and service strategies.
news.why_it_matters: The success of physical vs digital-first distribution will determine long-term market share in the competitive two-wheeler EV market.

news.title: GCCs managed to ward off AI impact on hiring—not anymore
news.india_relevance: Global Capability Centres in India, a major source of high-end jobs, are finally seeing AI disrupt their recruitment patterns.
news.why_it_matters: This marks a turning point for India's white-collar job market as routine coding and back-office tasks are automated.

news.title: India cuts telecom spectrum prices as operator interest dries up
news.india_relevance: The government is lowering entry barriers for 5G and satellite spectrum to maintain interest in the telecom sector.
news.why_it_matters: Reduced spectrum costs are essential for the financial health of telcos but reflect a cooling of the previous bidding frenzy.

news.title: RBI steps in to steady rupee, bonds as oil above $100 raises inflation fears
news.india_relevance: The central bank is actively managing currency volatility and bond yields to shield the economy from imported inflation.
news.why_it_matters: RBI's intervention strategy is the primary defense against global macro shocks destabilizing India's fiscal math.

news.title: Law firms field force majeure queries as war sets off panic
news.india_relevance: Indian companies are reviewing contracts to see if they can legally exit obligations due to the Middle East conflict.
news.why_it_matters: This indicates widespread business disruption and potential legal battles over supply chain failures and rising costs.

news.title: India's February power demand hits 15-year high amid rising temperatures: Crisil
news.india_relevance: Unusual weather patterns are putting unprecedented strain on India's power grid and coal supplies.
news.why_it_matters: Rising power demand during non-peak months signals a structural shift in energy consumption and potential for summer shortages.

news.title: IDFC First Bank settles Chandigarh fraud claims at ₹645 crore; says deposits stable, no further discrepancies found
news.india_relevance: A major private bank resolves a significant governance and fraud issue to protect its reputation and capital.
news.why_it_matters: The settlement highlights the ongoing challenges of internal controls and fraud management in India's expanding banking sector.

news.title: Kotak Mahindra Bank eyes M&A to deploy excess capital
news.india_relevance: One of India's most capitalized banks is moving toward inorganic growth to maintain its market position.
news.why_it_matters: This could trigger a new wave of consolidation in the Indian private banking and NBFC space.

news.title: Three decades of markets: A Balasubramanian on compounding, investor evolution and India’s long-term promise
news.india_relevance: A veteran market voice provides a historical perspective on the maturation of the Indian equity culture.
news.why_it_matters: Understanding the shift from speculative trading to long-term compounding is vital for India's retail investor narrative.

news.title: Equal opportunities for women may be the fastest way to generate jobs and accelerate economic growth
news.india_relevance: Increasing female labor force participation is identified as a critical lever for India's GDP growth.
news.why_it_matters: This addresses a structural weakness in the Indian economy and suggests policy shifts toward social infrastructure.

news.title: BrahMos missile export: Indonesia agreement may benefit HAL, Data Patterns and 3 other defence stocks
news.india_relevance: India's defense manufacturing sector is successfully pivoting from being a top importer to a serious exporter.
news.why_it_matters: Defense exports are a key pillar of the 'Atmanirbhar Bharat' initiative and provide high-value manufacturing jobs.

news.title: AI just broke brands’ Google ad strategy. The answer is the ad
news.india_relevance: Indian digital marketers and brands are grappling with how generative AI is changing search and discovery.
news.why_it_matters: As AI agents replace traditional search, the entire unit economics of Indian e-commerce and digital services will change.

news.title: Like banks, leadership rotation rule may apply to large NBFCs
news.india_relevance: RBI is considering stricter governance norms for shadow banks to bring them on par with commercial banks.
news.why_it_matters: Forcing leadership changes at large NBFCs could disrupt long-standing management structures but improve systemic stability.

news.title: Domestic investors control 36% of free float Nifty 50 market capitalisation, says SEBI Chairman
news.india_relevance: Indian retail and institutional investors have become a formidable force, reducing the market's dependence on foreign flows.
news.why_it_matters: This 'democratization' of capital provides a cushion against global volatility and changes the dynamics of Indian market cycles.
